Video.summary: From sowing to reaping, everything Nina and Brendon do is connected to the rhythm of the seasons.
Video.title: A Season for Everything

Video.summary: It’s time for hands to get dirty as Nina unearths the wonders of good soil.
Video.title: Good Soil

Video.summary: Meet Nina and Brendan, who swapped sound checks for soil and left life on the road for life on a farm.
Video.title: Welcome to the Farm

Video.summary: Nina proves that citrus trees teach us valuable things about seasons and relationships.
Video.title: Fields not Factories

Video.summary: Nina and Brendon’s walk through the dark valley leads to unforeseen miracles and joy.
Video.title: After the Rain

Video.summary: As the Shirley family farm continues to grow, so does the community it celebrates.
Video.title: The Joy of Sharing

Video.summary: Andrea goes to Nashville to spend a day with Brad Rempel, lead singer of country music sensation High Valley.
Video.title: Brad Rempel's Country Music Cottage

Video.summary: Jillian experiences a kaleidoscope of color exploring the Mosaic Tile House and the Rainbow House.
Video.title: Living in Art: Kaleidoscopic Homes

Video.summary: Andrea's off to Palm Springs for a fun-filled day with actor Jonathan Bennett.
Video.title: Jonathan Bennett’s Mai Tai Manor
